summary: Full retest of rebuilt ELP module (post-iteration_40) for the new shape: optional company_name/usdot_number (no driver_name/cdl_number), inspector-judged interview_disposition, 4-sign cap with per-sign result+notes, and Show-to-Driver fullscreen mode. Rewrote /app/backend/tests/test_elp_assessments.py for the new SaveElpAssessmentRequest model — 6/6 pytest pass. Frontend Playwright validated all 13 listed scenarios end-to-end on /elp + InspectionDetail.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:1590 DELETE /inspections/{id}/elp/{aid} silently returns ok:true even when inspection_id or assessment_id does not exist (no matched_count check). Consistent with other delete endpoints but a 404 path would be cleaner.

SaveElpAssessmentRequest still accepts arbitrary strings for interview_disposition / sign_test_result / overall_disposition — could be tightened with Literal['pass','inconclusive','fail',''] etc. for stricter validation.
ElpAssessmentPage.js is approaching 700-line guideline; consider splitting InterviewRow / SignRunner / Disposition / SaveModal into separate files if more is added.
The post-save UX gap from iteration_40 ('stays on /elp after Create+Save') is now FIXED — Playwright verified URL navigates to /inspections/{newId} after createAndSave.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_elp_assessments.py (rewritten for new shape — 6 tests, all passing)

success_rate.frontend: 100% — every listed scenario verified (header/reference + optional context inputs + disclaimer + verbatim Q1/Q12 + paraphrases + HM toggle Q13 + inspector judgment Pass/Inconclusive/Fail + amber 'Continue to Sign Selection' + 24-sign grid + 4-sign cap + 'Pick exactly 4' toast on 5th + Start Sign Test enable/label + Show-to-Driver fullscreen with header HIDDEN + ESC exit + Identified/Not Identified + counters/4 + Save modal + Create+Save navigates to /inspections/{id} + InspectionDetail card shows Company/USDOT/INTERVIEW/SIGN TEST result with counts)

seed_data_creation: Backend pytest creates and cleans up 'TEST_ELP_Inspection'. Frontend test created 'TEST_ELP_UI Co' inspection (USDOT 9876543) — left in DB for main agent visual inspection if needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: ELP module post-rebuild is fully functional. Backend POST/DELETE /api/inspections/{id}/elp use the new SaveElpAssessmentRequest with company_name, usdot_number, interview_disposition, sign_test_result, sign_pass_count, sign_fail_count, sign_answers[].notes — verified extras (driver_name, cdl_number) are dropped by Pydantic and never persisted. UI: all data-testid hooks resolve correctly (elp-reference, elp-company-name, elp-usdot, elp-hm-toggle, elp-q-{key}-asked, elp-interview-pass/inconclusive/fail, elp-go-signs-btn, elp-sign-grid, elp-sign-pick-1..24, elp-show-to-driver-btn, elp-driver-back-btn, elp-disp-proficient/not-proficient, elp-save-btn, elp-create-and-save, elp-reset-btn). The 24-sign visual rendering screenshot verified correct categories: white SPEED LIMIT 50, embedded LEFT arrow on ONE WAY, ORANGE diamond #3 / YELLOW diamond #4, yellow square + up_right arrow on RUNAWAY TRUCK RAMP, RED horizontal WRONG WAY, ORANGE horizontal ROAD WORK, white rect with RED text on NO PARKING, dark navy electronic signs.
